Products 

\# XQ Pharma Products Database 

This document contains a list of skin, hair and kids products offered by **XQ Pharma**, categorized by type.   
Each entry follows a consistent structure similar to a course listing: a unique ID, category, type, an English description, the original Arabic title, details about the active ingredients and how they work together, usage instructions, the intended audience, a rich keyword tree with Arabic and English phrases, and a link to the official product page.   
The routines section at the end groups compatible products into complete regimens for specific needs such as oily skin, brightening, hair rescue and kids care. 

\--- 

XQ Facial Cleanser 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_facial\_cleanser   
**Category:** Skin Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A gentle foaming cleanser that purifies pores without stripping moisture, making it ideal for oily and combination skin. It combines salicylic acid and niacinamide to control sebum, tea tree oil to fight bacteria, and hyaluronic acid to maintain hydration[\[1\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-facial-cleanser#:~:text=Key%20Active%20Ingredients%20%26%20Benefits).   
**Original Title (AR):** غسول الوجه إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Niacinamide (Vitamin B3):** regulates oil production, refines pore size and enhances skin smoothness.   
• **Salicylic Acid:** deeply cleanses pores and reduces blackheads and whiteheads[\[1\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-facial-cleanser#:~:text=Key%20Active%20Ingredients%20%26%20Benefits).   
• **Tea Tree Oil:** antibacterial agent that soothes inflammation and reduces breakouts.   
• **Hyaluronic Acid:** maintains hydration and prevents tightness after cleansing.   
**Synergy:** Niacinamide and salicylic acid work together to control oil and cleanse pores, while hyaluronic acid and tea tree oil balance hydration and calm the skin.   
**How to Use:** Apply morning and night to damp skin, massage gently for one minute, then rinse thoroughly.   
\- **Target Audience:** Oily and combination skin prone to acne.   
\- **Format:** 150 ml gel cleanser (typical size).   
**Keyword Tree:** غسول إكس كيو للوجه, XQ Facial Cleanser, غسول البشرة الدهنية, منظف الوجه بأحماض ساليسيليك, Niacinamide cleanser, Tea tree cleanser, غسول البشرة المختلطة, cleanser for oily skin, gentle facial wash, غسول علاج حب الشباب, daily face wash for oily skin, منظف نياسيناميد, منظف حمض الهيالورونيك, Salicylic face wash   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-facial-cleanser) 

\--- 

XQ Moisturizer Cream Gel 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_moisturizer\_cream\_gel   
**Category:** Skin Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A lightweight gel moisturizer delivering long‑lasting hydration and a non‑greasy finish. It balances sebum production and strengthens the skin barrier, making it ideal for oily and combination skin.   
**Original Title (AR):** كريم جل مرطب إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Hyaluronic Acid:** provides deep hydration and a plump appearance.   
• **Niacinamide:** balances sebum and minimizes shine[\[2\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-moisturizer-cream-gel#:~:text=Key%20Active%20Ingredients%20%26%20Benefits).   
• **Ceramide:** strengthens the skin barrier and protects against dehydration.   
• **Allantoin:** soothes sensitive skin and reduces redness.   
**Synergy:** Hyaluronic acid and ceramide deliver long‑lasting moisture and barrier repair, while niacinamide and allantoin calm and balance the complexion.   
**How to Use:** Use morning and night on clean skin. Apply a small amount to face and neck after serum and before sunscreen or makeup.   
\- **Target Audience:** All skin types, particularly oily or combination skin.   
\- **Format:** 50 g jar or pump (typical size).   
**Keyword Tree:** مرطب إكس كيو, XQ Moisturizer Cream Gel, كريم جل مرطب, مرطب للبشرة الدهنية, lightweight moisturizer, Niacinamide moisturizer, Hyaluronic acid gel, moisturizing gel for combination skin, cream gel for oily skin, مرطب خالٍ من الزيوت, ceramide moisturizer   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-moisturizer-cream-gel) 

\--- 

XQ Acne Prone Skin Cream Gel 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_acne\_prone\_skin\_cream\_gel   
**Category:** Skin Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A treatment gel for acne‑prone skin that combines exfoliating acids and soothing agents to unclog pores, reduce inflammation and prevent new breakouts.   
**Original Title (AR):** كريم جل للبشرة المعرضة لحب الشباب   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Salicylic Acid:** exfoliates and removes pore congestion.   
• **Lactic Acid:** gently resurfaces skin and improves texture[\[3\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-acne-prone-skin-cream-gel#:~:text=Key%20Active%20Ingredients%20%26%20Benefits).   
• **Niacinamide:** soothes irritation and regulates oil production.   
• **Tea Tree Oil:** natural antibacterial that calms redness and prevents future breakouts.   
**Synergy:** Salicylic acid and lactic acid purify and renew the skin without harsh exfoliation, while niacinamide and tea tree oil calm inflammation and help prevent new acne lesions.   
**How to Use:** Apply morning and night, focusing on breakout‑prone areas or the entire face if needed.   
\- **Target Audience:** Oily and acne‑prone skin.   
\- **Format:** 30 ml tube (typical size).   
**Keyword Tree:** كريم حب الشباب إكس كيو, XQ Acne Cream Gel, علاج حب الشباب, acne spot treatment, Salicylic acid gel, Lactic acid cream, Niacinamide acne treatment, Tea tree acne gel, anti‑blemish gel, كريم لعلاج البثور, جل لعلاج البثور, كريم لعلاج البقع, acne prone skin care   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-acne-prone-skin-cream-gel) 

\--- 

XQ Vitamin C Serum 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_vitamin\_c\_serum   
**Category:** Skin Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A brightening serum that combines Vitamin C with niacinamide and hyaluronic acid to even the complexion, soothe irritation and hydrate skin, resulting in a radiant and youthful appearance[\[4\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-vitamin-c-serum#:~:text=Key%20Active%20Ingredients%20%26%20Benefits).   
**Original Title (AR):** سيروم فيتامين C إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid):** brightens skin and enhances collagen production[\[4\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-vitamin-c-serum#:~:text=Key%20Active%20Ingredients%20%26%20Benefits).   
• **Niacinamide:** reduces redness and improves skin texture.   
• **Hyaluronic Acid:** hydrates and smooths fine lines.   
**Synergy:** Vitamin C and niacinamide boost brightness while calming redness; Vitamin C and hyaluronic acid lock in moisture and enhance glow.   
**How to Use:** Apply 2–3 drops morning on clean skin; follow with sunscreen. Optional: apply at night before moisturizer.   
\- **Target Audience:** All skin types, particularly dull or uneven skin.   
\- **Format:** 30 ml dropper bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** سيروم فيتامين C, Vitamin C Serum, مصل التفتيح, brightening serum, Niacinamide and Vitamin C, Hyaluronic acid serum, سيروم للبشرة الباهتة, antioxidant serum, سيروم لعلاج التصبغات, Serum with Ascorbic Acid, Serum for glowing skin   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-vitamin-c-serum)

XQ Whitening Cleanser 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_whitening\_cleanser   
**Category:** Skin Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A deep‑cleansing and brightening face wash with niacinamide, alpha arbutin, licorice extract and panthenol to reduce dark spots, soothe irritation and support the moisture barrier[\[5\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-whitening-cleanser#:~:text=Product%20Highlights).   
**Original Title (AR):** غسول التفتيح إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Niacinamide:** minimizes pores and brightens skin.   
• **Alpha Arbutin:** lightens hyperpigmentation[\[5\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-whitening-cleanser#:~:text=Product%20Highlights).   
• **Licorice Extract:** reduces inflammation and dark spots.   
• **Panthenol (Pro‑Vitamin B5):** hydrates and restores softness.   
**Synergy:** Niacinamide and licorice extract calm and brighten skin, while alpha arbutin targets discoloration and panthenol locks in moisture.   
**How to Use:** On damp skin, massage a small amount for a minute and rinse thoroughly; use twice daily.   
\- **Target Audience:** All skin types, especially those with dark spots or uneven tone.   
\- **Format:** 150 ml cleanser (typical size).   
**Keyword Tree:** غسول التفتيح, XQ Whitening Cleanser, brightening face wash, Alpha Arbutin cleanser, Niacinamide brightening cleanser, Licorice extract face wash, غسول لتفتيح البشرة, cleanser for dark spots, daily brightening cleanser, gentle exfoliating cleanser, Panthenol cleanser   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-whitening-cleanser) 

\--- 

XQ Whitening Cream Gel 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_whitening\_cream\_gel   
**Category:** Skin Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A lightweight gel cream that reduces dark spots and hyperpigmentation, evens skin tone and improves elasticity. Powered by niacinamide, alpha arbutin, tranexamic acid and Lumiskin™[\[6\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-whitening-cream-gel#:~:text=Product%20Highlights).   
**Original Title (AR):** كريم جل التفتيح إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Niacinamide:** refines texture and balances oil.   
• **Alpha Arbutin:** lightens dark spots.   
• **Tranexamic Acid:** targets stubborn pigmentation[\[6\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-whitening-cream-gel#:~:text=Product%20Highlights).   
• **Lumiskin™:** boosts radiance and evenness.   
**Synergy:** Niacinamide, alpha arbutin and tranexamic acid synergize to reduce melanin production and fade discoloration, while Lumiskin™ enhances brightness.   
**How to Use:** Apply morning and evening to face and neck after cleansing; in the morning, follow with a broad‑spectrum sunscreen.   
\- **Target Audience:** All skin types, particularly those with hyperpigmentation.   
\- **Format:** 50 g jar or pump.   
**Keyword Tree:** كريم تفتيح إكس كيو, XQ Whitening Cream Gel, تفتيح البقع الداكنة, hyperpigmentation cream, Niacinamide and Alpha Arbutin, Tranexamic acid cream, brightening gel cream, Lumiskin cream, كريم للكلف, كريم لتوحيد لون البشرة, skin tone evening cream, lightweight whitening gel   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-whitening-cream-gel) 

\--- 

XQ Anti Dandruff Shampoo 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_anti\_dandruff\_shampoo   
**Category:** Hair Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A triple‑action shampoo formulated with selenium sulfide, piroctone olamine and salicylic acid to combat dandruff. It deeply cleanses the scalp, removes flakes and oil, while menthol and panthenol soothe irritation and glycerin conditions the hair[\[7\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-dandruff-shampoo#:~:text=Ultimate%20Scalp%20Care%20%26%20Dandruff,Control).   
**Original Title (AR):** شامبو ضد القشرة إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Selenium Sulfide & Piroctone Olamine:** eliminate the fungi responsible for dandruff and prevent recurrence.   
• **Salicylic Acid:** removes flakes and exfoliates the scalp.   
• **Menthol & Panthenol:** relieve itchiness and impart a cooling sensation.   
• **Glycerin & Conditioners:** hydrate the hair and prevent dryness.   
**Synergy:** Selenium sulfide and piroctone olamine work together to eradicate dandruff, while salicylic acid clears flakes. Menthol and panthenol soothe itchiness, and glycerin maintains hair softness.   
**How to Use:** Apply to wet hair, massage into scalp and leave for 2–3 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Use 2–3 times per week.   
\- **Target Audience:** Individuals suffering from dandruff and oily scalp.   
\- **Format:** 200 ml bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** شامبو ضد القشرة, XQ Anti Dandruff Shampoo, dandruff control, selenium sulfide shampoo, Piroctone Olamine shampoo, Salicylic acid shampoo, anti‑itch scalp shampoo, شامبو للقشرة, deep cleansing shampoo, dandruff treatment, scalp exfoliating shampoo, شامبو منتول   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-dandruff-shampoo) 

\--- 

XQ Anti Hair Loss Shampoo 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_anti\_hair\_loss\_shampoo   
**Category:** Hair Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A lightweight shampoo enriched with Procapil, Capixyl, Aminexil, Caffeine, Arginine, Rosemary and Horsetail extracts, Panthenol, Aloe Vera and glycerin. It strengthens hair follicles, reduces shedding, stimulates circulation and moisturizes the scalp[\[8\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-shampoo#:~:text=Product%20highlights).   
**Original Title (AR):** شامبو ضد تساقط الشعر إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Procapil, Capixyl & Aminexil:** fortify hair follicles and reduce hair loss[\[8\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-shampoo#:~:text=Product%20highlights).   
• **Caffeine & Arginine:** stimulate blood circulation and boost nutrient supply to follicles.   
• **Rosemary & Horsetail Extracts:** soothe the scalp and support growth.   
• **Panthenol, Aloe Vera & Glycerin:** moisturize and soften hair.   
**Synergy:** Procapil, Capixyl and Aminexil strengthen and revitalize follicles, caffeine and arginine stimulate circulation, while panthenol, aloe vera and rosemary hydrate and calm the scalp.   
**How to Use:** Wet hair, apply shampoo and massage gently; leave for 2–3 minutes then rinse. Repeat 3–4 times weekly.   
\- **Target Audience:** All hair types, especially thinning or shedding hair.   
\- **Format:** 200 ml bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** شامبو ضد التساقط, XQ Anti Hair Loss Shampoo, hair loss shampoo, Procapil shampoo, Capixyl shampoo, Aminexil shampoo, caffeine shampoo, شامبو الكافيين, strengthening shampoo, aloe vera shampoo, shampoo for hair growth, شامبو تقوية الشعر, scalp circulation shampoo   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-shampoo) 

\--- 

XQ Anti Hair Loss Hair Serum 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_anti\_hair\_loss\_hair\_serum   
**Category:** Hair Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A lightweight, non‑greasy serum formulated with jojoba oil, vitamin E and light silicones to nourish hair, protect from split ends, control frizz and enhance shine[\[9\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-hair-serum#:~:text=Product%20highlights).   
**Original Title (AR):** سيروم الشعر ضد التساقط إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Cyclopentasiloxane & Dimethiconol:** light silicones that smooth and reduce frizz without weighing hair down.   
• **Jojoba Oil:** deeply nourishes and moisturizes hair shafts.   
• **Vitamin E (Tocopheryl Acetate):** protects against oxidative stress and reduces split ends.   
• **Isopropyl Myristate:** enhances absorption and provides a silky feel.   
**Synergy:** Jojoba oil and vitamin E nourish and protect hair, light silicones provide sleekness and shine, and isopropyl myristate improves the overall texture and absorption of the serum.   
**How to Use:** Apply a few drops to wet or dry hair, focusing on mid‑lengths and ends; do not rinse. Use daily or as needed.   
\- **Target Audience:** All hair types, particularly dry or damaged hair needing nourishment.   
\- **Format:** 50 ml dropper bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** سيروم الشعر, XQ Hair Serum, anti‑hair loss serum, Jojoba oil hair serum, Vitamin E serum, silicone hair serum, split end treatment, leave‑in hair serum, serum for frizz, nourishing hair oil, سيروم لمعان الشعر   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-hair-serum) 

\--- 

XQ Anti‑Hair Loss & Deep Moisture Hair Mask 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_anti\_hair\_loss\_deep\_moisture\_hair\_mask   
**Category:** Hair Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** An intensive hair mask combining Aminexil, Capixyl, Procapil, Caffeine and Argan Oil to strengthen hair roots, deeply hydrate and nourish hair, reduce frizz and improve softness[\[10\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-deep-moisture-hair-mask#:~:text=,dry%2C%20weak%2C%20and%20damaged%20hair).   
**Original Title (AR):** قناع الشعر العميق مع علاج التساقط إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Aminexil, Capixyl & Procapil:** strengthen roots and reduce shedding.   
• **Caffeine:** stimulates scalp circulation for healthier growth.   
• **Argan Oil:** deeply hydrates, nourishes and smooths hair.   
**Synergy:** Aminexil, Capixyl and Procapil fortify follicles, caffeine energizes the scalp and argan oil provides intense moisture and shine.   
**How to Use:** After shampooing, apply the mask to lengths and ends; leave for several minutes then rinse thoroughly. Use once or twice weekly.   
\- **Target Audience:** Dry or weak hair needing deep hydration and strengthening.   
\- **Format:** 300 ml jar.   
**Keyword Tree:** ماسك الشعر العميق, XQ Hair Mask, hair loss mask, deep moisture hair mask, Aminexil hair mask, Capixyl hair mask, Procapil hair mask, caffeine hair treatment, argan oil mask, intensive hair treatment, moisturizing hair mask, ماسك لعلاج تساقط الشعر   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-deep-moisture-hair-mask)

XQ Anti Hair Loss Leave‑In Cream 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_anti\_hair\_loss\_leave\_in\_cream   
**Category:** Hair Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A lightweight leave‑in cream enriched with Procapil, Capixyl, Caffeine, Arginine, Argan Oil and Sweet Almond Oil to strengthen follicles, stimulate circulation, hydrate hair and provide shine[\[11\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-leave-in-cream#:~:text=Product%20highlights).   
**Original Title (AR):** كريم ليف إن لعلاج التساقط إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Procapil & Capixyl:** strengthen hair follicles and reduce shedding.   
• **Caffeine & Arginine:** stimulate microcirculation and energize the scalp.   
• **Argan Oil & Sweet Almond Oil:** provide hydration and shine while reducing dryness.   
**Synergy:** Procapil and Capixyl act on the follicle root, caffeine and arginine boost blood flow, while argan and almond oils nourish and smooth hair strands.   
**How to Use:** Distribute a small amount on damp or dry hair, focusing on mid‑lengths and ends; do not rinse. Use daily.   
\- **Target Audience:** All hair types, especially weak or dry hair.   
\- **Format:** 150 ml tube.   
**Keyword Tree:** كريم ليف إن, XQ Leave‑In Cream, leave‑in for hair loss, Procapil leave‑in, Capixyl leave‑in, caffeine hair cream, Arginine hair treatment, Argan oil hair cream, almond oil cream, leave‑in conditioner, leave‑in moisturiser for hair, leave‑in repair cream   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-leave-in-cream)

XQ Anti Hair Loss Spray 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_anti\_hair\_loss\_spray   
**Category:** Hair Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A fast‑absorbing spray combining Procapil, Capixyl, Redensyl, Aminexil, Caffeine, Arginine, Panthenol, Aloe Vera and Rosemary to stimulate new hair growth, strengthen follicles, hydrate and soothe the scalp[\[12\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-spray#:~:text=Product%20highlights).   
**Original Title (AR):** بخاخ ضد تساقط الشعر إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Procapil, Capixyl & Redensyl:** strengthen follicles and stimulate new hair growth.   
• **Aminexil & Caffeine:** improve hair anchoring and microcirculation.   
• **Arginine, Panthenol & Aloe Vera:** hydrate and soothe the scalp.   
• **Rosemary Extract:** offers antioxidant benefits and supports healthy growth.   
**Synergy:** Procapil, Capixyl and Redensyl work synergistically to increase hair density; caffeine and aminexil improve circulation and anchoring; arginine, panthenol and aloe vera replenish moisture and soothe, while rosemary provides antioxidative support.   
**How to Use:** Shake well, spray directly on the scalp, gently massage and do not rinse. Use daily.   
\- **Target Audience:** All hair types, particularly those experiencing thinning or hair loss.   
\- **Format:** 200 ml spray bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** بخاخ الشعر, XQ Hair Loss Spray, anti‑hair loss spray, Procapil hair spray, Capixyl spray, Redensyl spray, Aminexil spray, caffeine hair spray, alopecia treatment spray, scalp stimulating spray, مرطب لفروة الرأس, growth‑promoting spray, بخاخ لنمو الشعر   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-hair-loss-spray)

XQ Kids Simba Moisturizing Cream 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_kids\_simba\_moisturizing\_cream   
**Category:** Kids Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A gentle face and body moisturizer for children that hydrates, soothes and protects sensitive skin using aloe vera, glycerin, panthenol, vitamin E, shea butter and chamomile extracts[\[13\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-simba-moisturizing-cream#:~:text=XQ%20Kids%20Simba%20Cream%20hydrates,and%20healthy%20%E2%80%93%20120%20ml).   
**Original Title (AR):** كريم مرطب أطفال سيمبا إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Aloe Vera & Glycerin:** provide natural hydration and relieve irritation.   
• **Panthenol (Pro‑Vitamin B5) & Vitamin E:** protect against dryness and support healing.   
• **Shea Butter & Chamomile Extract:** improve skin smoothness and calm redness.   
**Synergy:** Aloe vera and glycerin hydrate and soothe, panthenol and vitamin E repair and protect, while shea butter and chamomile deliver softness and comfort.   
**How to Use:** Apply to the face and body as needed to maintain soft, healthy skin.   
\- **Target Audience:** Children’s sensitive skin requiring hydration and soothing.   
\- **Format:** 200 ml tube or jar.   
**Keyword Tree:** كريم أطفال سيمبا, XQ Kids Simba Moisturizing Cream, kids moisturizer, children’s face cream, aloe vera kids cream, chamomile cream for kids, hydrating cream for children, Panthenol cream, Shea butter kids moisturizer, كريم مرطب للأطفال, مرطب للاطفال, gentle kids lotion

XQ Kids Memo Shampoo 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_kids\_memo\_shampoo   
**Category:** Kids Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A mild shampoo specially formulated for children’s hair. It contains panthenol, glycerin, aloe vera, calendula, chamomile, coconut oil and vitamin E to cleanse gently, moisturize and leave hair soft[\[14\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-memo-shampoo#:~:text=XQ%20Memo%20Kids%20Shampoo%20is,friendly%20scent).   
**Original Title (AR):** شامبو الأطفال ميمو إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Panthenol, Glycerin & Aloe Vera:** cleanse and hydrate hair and scalp.   
• **Calendula & Chamomile Extracts:** soothe the scalp and provide natural conditioning.   
• **Coconut Oil & Vitamin E:** nourish hair and enhance softness.   
**Synergy:** Panthenol, glycerin and aloe vera deliver moisture; calendula and chamomile calm the scalp; coconut oil and vitamin E nourish and protect hair.   
**How to Use:** Apply to wet hair, lather gently and rinse thoroughly.   
\- **Target Audience:** Children’s delicate hair and scalp.   
\- **Format:** 300 ml bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** شامبو أطفال, XQ Kids Memo Shampoo, kids shampoo, gentle cleansing shampoo, Panthenol kids shampoo, aloe vera kids shampoo, شامبو لطيف للأطفال, calendula shampoo, chamomile shampoo, coconut oil shampoo, Vitamin E shampoo, شامبو العناية بالأطفال

XQ Kids Nemo Conditioner 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_kids\_nemo\_conditioner   
**Category:** Kids Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A softening conditioner designed for children. It detangles and hydrates hair using panthenol, glycerin, shea butter, argan oil, coconut oil, chamomile, calendula and vitamin E[\[15\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-nemo-conditioner#:~:text=XQ%20Nemo%20Kids%20Conditioner%20helps,for%20kids%E2%80%99%20hair%20care%20routine).   
**Original Title (AR):** بلسم الأطفال نيمو إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Panthenol & Glycerin:** hydrate hair and improve smoothness.   
• **Shea Butter, Argan Oil & Coconut Oil:** deeply condition and reduce frizz.   
• **Chamomile & Calendula Extracts:** soothe the scalp and enhance manageability.   
• **Vitamin E:** supports hair health and shine.   
**Synergy:** Panthenol and glycerin moisturize, while shea butter, argan and coconut oils provide rich conditioning. Chamomile and calendula calm the scalp, and vitamin E adds protection.   
**How to Use:** After shampooing, apply to hair, leave briefly and rinse thoroughly.   
\- **Target Audience:** Children’s hair requiring softness and easy detangling.   
\- **Format:** 250 ml bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** بلسم أطفال, XQ Kids Nemo Conditioner, kids conditioner, detangling conditioner, Shea butter kids conditioner, Argan oil conditioner, Coconut oil conditioner, Chamomile conditioner, Calendula conditioner, moisturizing conditioner for kids, بلسم للعناية بالأطفال, conditioner for children's hair   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-nemo-conditioner) 

\--- 

XQ Kids Boo Styling Cream 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_kids\_boo\_styling\_cream   
**Category:** Kids Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A lightweight styling cream formulated with panthenol, hydrolyzed keratin, shea butter, argan oil, coconut oil, chamomile, calendula and vitamin E to shape hair gently, protect against dryness and add shine[\[16\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/en-product-kids-moisturizer#:~:text=XQ%20Boo%20Kids%20Styling%20Cream,and%20suitable%20for%20daily%20use).   
**Original Title (AR):** كريم تصفيف الأطفال بو إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Panthenol & Hydrolyzed Keratin:** strengthen hair and enhance elasticity.   
• **Shea Butter, Argan Oil & Coconut Oil:** provide moisture and reduce frizz.   
• **Chamomile & Calendula Extracts:** soothe scalp and offer gentle conditioning.   
• **Vitamin E:** protects hair and boosts shine.   
**Synergy:** Panthenol and keratin fortify hair structure, shea butter and oils hydrate, chamomile and calendula calm, and vitamin E guards against damage.   
**How to Use:** Apply a small amount to wet or dry hair and style as desired. Do not rinse.   
\- **Target Audience:** Children’s hair requiring styling, hydration and protection.   
\- **Format:** 150 ml tube or jar.   
**Keyword Tree:** كريم تصفيف للأطفال, XQ Kids Boo Styling Cream, kids styling cream, keratin styling cream, Shea butter styling cream, Argan oil styling cream, Coconut oil styling cream, Panthenol styling cream, كريم تصفيف لطيف, children's hair styling, moisturizing styling cream   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-boo-styling-cream) 

\--- 

XQ Kids Koti Shower Gel – Strawberry 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_kids\_koti\_shower\_gel\_strawberry   
**Category:** Kids Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A fruity shower gel for children that gently cleanses and refreshes the skin while maintaining its natural softness. It contains panthenol, glycerin, aloe vera, calendula extract, chamomile extract, coconut oil and vitamin E[\[17\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-koti-shower-gel-strawberry#:~:text=XQ%20Koti%20Kids%20Shower%20Gel,makes%20bath%20time%20more%20enjoyable).   
**Original Title (AR):** جل استحمام الأطفال كوتي – الفراولة إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Panthenol, Glycerin & Aloe Vera:** cleanse and hydrate the skin.   
• **Calendula & Chamomile Extracts:** soothe and protect delicate skin.   
• **Coconut Oil & Vitamin E:** leave skin soft and supple.   
**Synergy:** Panthenol, glycerin and aloe vera deliver moisture; calendula and chamomile calm the skin; coconut oil and vitamin E nourish and maintain softness.   
**How to Use:** During bath time, apply to the skin, lather gently and rinse thoroughly.   
\- **Target Audience:** Children’s skin requiring gentle cleansing and hydration.   
\- **Format:** 500 ml bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** جل استحمام أطفال, XQ Kids Koti Shower Gel, shower gel for kids, fruity shower gel, strawberry shower gel, gentle bath gel, Panthenol shower gel, Aloe vera shower gel, calendula bath gel, chamomile bath gel, coconut oil body wash, moisturising shower gel for children, غسول استحمام للأطفال   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-koti-shower-gel-strawberry) 

\--- 

XQ Kids Bobi Shower Gel – Fruits 

**ID:** xq\_product:xq\_kids\_bobi\_shower\_gel\_fruits   
**Category:** Kids Care   
**Type:** Product   
**Description:** A gentle fruity shower gel for children that cleanses, hydrates and maintains skin softness. The formula features panthenol, glycerin, aloe vera, calendula extract, chamomile extract, coconut oil and vitamin E[\[18\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-bobi-shower-gel-fruits#:~:text=XQ%20Bobi%20Kids%20Shower%20Gel,Ideal%20for%20everyday%20use).   
**Original Title (AR):** جل استحمام الأطفال بوبي – الفواكه إكس كيو   
**Active Ingredients:**   
• **Panthenol, Glycerin & Aloe Vera:** cleanse and hydrate the skin.   
• **Calendula & Chamomile Extracts:** soothe and protect delicate skin.   
• **Coconut Oil & Vitamin E:** nourish and maintain softness.   
**Synergy:** Panthenol, glycerin and aloe vera moisturize; calendula and chamomile calm; coconut oil and vitamin E nourish the skin for long‑lasting softness.   
**How to Use:** During bath time, apply to skin, lather gently and rinse thoroughly.   
\- **Target Audience:** Children’s skin requiring gentle cleansing and hydration.   
\- **Format:** 500 ml bottle.   
**Keyword Tree:** جل استحمام للأطفال, XQ Kids Bobi Shower Gel, fruity shower gel for kids, gentle body wash, Panthenol body wash, Aloe vera body wash, Calendula body wash, Chamomile body wash, Coconut oil bath wash, Vitamin E bath gel, shower gel with fruits scent, kids bath cleanser, غسول جسم للأطفال   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-kids-bobi-shower-gel-fruits) 

\--- 

Routines 

The following entries group complementary products into ready‑made regimens targeting specific skin, hair or children’s care needs. Each routine lists included items and usage steps. 

\--- 

Oily & Combination Skin Care Routine 

**ID:** xq\_routine:oily\_combination\_skin\_care\_routine   
**Category:** Routine – Skin Care   
**Type:** Routine   
**Description:** A three‑step regimen for oily and combination skin to cleanse, treat and moisturize. It includes XQ Facial Cleanser, XQ Acne Prone Skin Cream Gel and XQ Moisturizer Cream Gel. This routine combines hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, salicylic acid, tea tree oil, ceramides and allantoin to regulate oil, hydrate and treat breakouts[\[19\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/oily-skin-care-offer#:~:text=Save%20360%20EGP%20and%20enjoy,EGP%20instead%20of%201035%20EGP).   
**Original Title (AR):** روتين العناية بالبشرة الدهنية والمختلطة   
**Includes:** Facial Cleanser, Acne Prone Skin Cream Gel, Moisturizer Cream Gel.   
**How to Use:**   
1\. **Cleanse:** Use XQ Facial Cleanser morning and evening on damp skin.   
2\. **Treat:** Apply XQ Acne Prone Skin Cream Gel to breakout‑prone areas; allow it to absorb.   
3\. **Moisturize:** Finish with XQ Moisturizer Cream Gel; apply sunscreen during the day.   
\- **Target Audience:** Oily and combination skin experiencing blemishes.   
**Keyword Tree:** روتين البشرة الدهنية, Oily skin routine, Combination skin routine, XQ Oily Skin Care, Niacinamide and Salicylic acid routine, Tea tree skin care, three‑step skincare routine, روتين البشرة المختلطة, acne treatment regimen, روتين تنظيف البشرة, skin care set for oily skin   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/oily-skin-care-routine) 

\--- 

Extra Whitening Routine 

**ID:** xq\_routine:extra\_whitening\_routine   
**Category:** Routine – Skin Care   
**Type:** Routine   
**Description:** A brightening regimen that combines the Whitening Cleanser, Vitamin C Serum and Whitening Cream Gel to lighten dark spots, even skin tone and enhance glow. Powered by niacinamide, alpha arbutin, tranexamic acid and vitamin C[\[20\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/extra-whitening-offers#:~:text=Get%20your%20glow%20on%20with,XQ%20Whitening%20Routine).   
**Original Title (AR):** روتين التفتيح الإضافي   
**Includes:** Whitening Cleanser, Vitamin C Serum, Whitening Cream Gel.   
**How to Use:**   
1\. **Cleanse:** Wash face with XQ Whitening Cleanser morning and evening.   
2\. **Serum:** Apply 2–3 drops of Vitamin C Serum; follow with sunscreen in the morning.   
3\. **Moisturize:** Apply Whitening Cream Gel morning and evening; always apply sunscreen during the day.   
\- **Target Audience:** Skin with hyperpigmentation or dullness seeking brightness.   
**Keyword Tree:** روتين التفتيح, Extra whitening routine, Brightening skincare regimen, Hyperpigmentation treatment, Alpha Arbutin routine, Vitamin C routine, Tranexamic acid routine, XQ brightening set, even skin tone routine, روتين توحيد لون البشرة   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/extra-whitening-routine) 

\--- 

Hair Rescue Trio Routine 

**ID:** xq\_routine:hair\_rescue\_trio\_routine   
**Category:** Routine – Hair Care   
**Type:** Routine   
**Description:** A three‑product set designed to strengthen hair roots, reduce hair fall and promote growth. It includes Anti Hair Loss Shampoo, Anti‑Hair Loss & Deep Moisture Hair Mask and Anti Hair Loss Leave‑In Cream. Enriched with Capixyl, Caffeine, Aminexil, Rosemary and Procapil to nourish and fortify hair[\[21\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/hair-rescue-trio#:~:text=Revive%20your%20hair%20with%20the,Shipping%20for%20a%20limited%20time).   
**Original Title (AR):** روتين إنقاذ الشعر (ثلاثي)   
**Includes:** Anti Hair Loss Shampoo, Anti‑Hair Loss & Deep Moisture Hair Mask, Anti Hair Loss Leave‑In Cream.   
**How to Use:**   
1\. **Wash:** Use the Anti Hair Loss Shampoo 3–4 times per week.   
2\. **Mask:** Once or twice per week, after shampooing, apply the Deep Moisture Hair Mask; leave for a few minutes and rinse.   
3\. **Leave‑In:** Apply the Leave‑In Cream daily on damp or dry hair, focusing on ends; do not rinse.   
\- **Target Audience:** Individuals experiencing hair loss or weak hair needing strengthening and hydration.   
**Keyword Tree:** روتين إنقاذ الشعر, Hair rescue routine, Hair loss treatment set, Capixyl routine, Procapil routine, Aminexil routine, Deep moisture hair care, XQ hair rescue trio, hair growth stimulation routine, hair strengthening routine   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/hair-rescue-trio) 

\--- 

Hair Protection Trio Routine 

**ID:** xq\_routine:hair\_protection\_trio\_routine   
**Category:** Routine – Hair Care   
**Type:** Routine   
**Description:** A protective routine featuring the Anti Hair Loss Hair Serum, Anti Hair Loss Spray and Anti Hair Loss Shampoo. This combination nourishes, strengthens and protects hair from damage while stimulating growth and maintaining hydration. It leverages Procapil, Capixyl, Redensyl, Aminexil, Caffeine, jojoba oil, vitamin E and botanical extracts to shield hair against breakage and promote a healthy scalp.   
**Original Title (AR):** روتين حماية الشعر (ثلاثي)   
**Includes:** Anti Hair Loss Hair Serum, Anti Hair Loss Spray, Anti Hair Loss Shampoo.   
**How to Use:**   
1\. **Wash:** Cleanse hair with Anti Hair Loss Shampoo 3–4 times per week.   
2\. **Serum:** After washing, apply Hair Serum to mid‑lengths and ends; do not rinse.   
3\. **Spray:** Daily, spray Anti Hair Loss Spray directly on the scalp and massage; do not rinse.   
\- **Target Audience:** Individuals seeking to prevent hair loss, nourish hair and maintain a healthy scalp.   
**Keyword Tree:** روتين حماية الشعر, Hair protection routine, Hair care trio, Anti hair loss spray routine, Jojoba oil hair treatment, Redensyl routine, Capixyl routine, Procapil routine, hair strengthening and protection set, scalp health routine   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/hair-protection-trio) 

\--- 

Kids Care Routine 

**ID:** xq\_routine:kids\_care\_routine   
**Category:** Routine – Kids Care   
**Type:** Routine   
**Description:** A gentle head‑to‑toe care routine for children using Kids Memo Shampoo, Kids Nemo Conditioner, Kids Boo Styling Cream, Kids Simba Moisturizing Cream and either the Koti Shower Gel or Bobi Shower Gel. This regimen cleanses hair and body, hydrates skin, detangles hair, provides gentle styling and leaves a fresh scent.   
**Original Title (AR):** روتين العناية بالأطفال   
**Includes:** Kids Memo Shampoo, Kids Nemo Conditioner, Kids Boo Styling Cream, Kids Simba Moisturizing Cream, Kids Koti Shower Gel – Strawberry or Kids Bobi Shower Gel – Fruits.   
**How to Use:**   
1\. **Hair Wash:** Shampoo hair with Memo Shampoo and rinse.   
2\. **Condition:** Apply Nemo Conditioner; leave briefly and rinse.   
3\. **Style:** Apply Boo Styling Cream to damp hair for easy styling; do not rinse.   
4\. **Moisturise:** Use Simba Moisturizing Cream on skin as needed.   
5\. **Bath:** During bath time, cleanse body with Koti or Bobi Shower Gel and rinse.   
\- **Target Audience:** Children’s hair and skin care.   
**Keyword Tree:** روتين الأطفال, Kids care routine, Children’s hair and skin care, gentle kids shampoo, kids conditioner, kids styling cream, kids moisturizer, kids shower gel, children’s bath routine, gentle bath products, روتين استحمام الأطفال, skincare routine for kids, routine for baby hair and skin   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/kids-care-routine) 

\--- 

Anti Dandruff Routine 

**ID:** xq\_routine:anti\_dandruff\_routine   
**Category:** Routine – Hair Care   
**Type:** Routine   
**Description:** A simple routine designed to combat dandruff and soothe the scalp using the Anti Dandruff Shampoo along with regular scalp massage and hydration. The regimen leverages selenium sulfide, piroctone olamine, salicylic acid, menthol and panthenol to eliminate dandruff and relieve itchiness[\[7\]](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/xq-anti-dandruff-shampoo#:~:text=Ultimate%20Scalp%20Care%20%26%20Dandruff,Control).   
**Original Title (AR):** روتين علاج القشرة   
**Includes:** Anti Dandruff Shampoo (plus optional scalp massaging tool).   
**How to Use:** Apply Anti Dandruff Shampoo to wet hair, massage gently, leave for 2–3 minutes and rinse. Use 2–3 times per week. Maintain hair hydration using a lightweight conditioner if desired.   
\- **Target Audience:** Individuals suffering from dandruff and itchy scalp.   
**Keyword Tree:** روتين القشرة, Anti dandruff routine, Scalp care routine, Dandruff treatment regimen, Selenium sulfide shampoo routine, Piroctone Olamine shampoo routine, Salicylic acid scalp treatment, itchy scalp relief routine, XQ anti dandruff set, scalp exfoliation routine   
**More Details:** Visit Our Website [Link](https://xqpharma.net/en/products/anti-dandruff-routine)
